sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49843" key="i)dioqane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-θᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n49843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">die a natural death</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:277" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">277</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
